svg.text: A Smart Digital Platform for Exploring and Accessing Government Housing Projects
Difficulty in finding accurate housing information
Lack of a unified platform for government housing
Limited interaction between users and housing providers
Provide a centralized platform for government housing
Simplify searching, comparing and application processes
Reduce time and effort for users and administrators
FINDOOR is a web and mobile-based platform that allows
users to explore, compare, and apply for housing units
easily. The system ensures transparency, accessibility,
and efficiency in the housing process.
Agile methodology was followed to ensure continuous improvement, flexibility and regular delivery of system features.
FINDOOR presents a smart and scalable solution for managing government housing
services digitally. The system improves transparency, accessibility, and efficiency,
making the housing process easier for users and more effective for administrators.
